segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, quick question. I'm trying to figure out my next move with all this luggage.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Cambridge. I might take the Red Line, but I may call an Uber if that's easier.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: The Red Line is straight ahead. If you need rideshare, go outside and follow ground transportation.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Is there an elevator to the Red Line? I really don't want to carry this down the stairs.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Yes, the elevator is on your right before the stairs.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. And is there a restroom nearby before I decide?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Past the ticket machines, on the left.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Red Line straight ahead, elevator on the right, restroom past the machines?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. Thank you. This station is bigger than I expected.
